subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: In the day of every Universal Dispensation two great events occur; one is collection and the other is separation.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @creation of the world
